title: Does this Evangelion game have Regional locking
display_title: Does this Evangelion game have Regional locking
wikitext:
[]: Does this Evangelion game have Regional locking?             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:00 pm I want this copy of Battle Orchestra from Ebay I saw but I want to know if Its locked for American PS2's does anyone have it who can answer this, And does it come with English subtitles.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:12 pm I believe it is region locked. You can still play it however, if you invest in Swap Magic and a slide tool/flip top, depending on your make of PS2. Don't know about the subs

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:13 pm Teague wrote: I believe it is region locked. You can still play it however, if you invest in Swap Magic and a slide tool/flip top, depending on your make of PS2. Don't know about the subs

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:19 pm ^NB4 Teauge, Even though I dont really know anything about that stuff either.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:21 pm Swap Magic is a disc that acts as an impromtu OS for the PS2, allowing you to bypass the region lock. Slide Tool is a card used to open the Disc Tray without the PS2 noticing (and thus, resetting and reloading the default OS) The two can normally be bought together Slide Tool only works on normal PS2's, if you have a PS2 Slim then you need a flip top cover, which an also be bought with Swap magic. For more information, see wiki. As for buying it, can try ebay, or a number of independant sites which can be reached by punching 'swap magic' into a search engine.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:24 pm Thanks man I'm gonna get right on that.
